command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X4kEZ5ZzWjACn8.ceec5373b537 --database ieT7v85aiPuCFersArU3SP --execute 
-- 用户总数
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM users;

-- 按天注册趋势
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as reg_date, COUNT(*) as new_users 
FROM users 
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY reg_date DESC 
LIMIT 30;

-- 用户角色分布
SELECT role, COUNT(*) as count FROM users GROUP BY role;
stdout:
total_users
1
reg_date	new_users
2026-01-23	1
role	count
admin	1
